summary_en: CM inaugurated first unit of Tata Motors JLR vehicle manufacturing plant built at Rs 900 crore (of total Rs 9,000 crore investment), creating 5,000 jobs at SIPCOT Panapakkam.

CM inaugurated 7th TIDEL Neo IT Park in Karaikudi built at Rs 28 crore on 5 acres with 50,000 sqft workspace for 600 IT professionals.

Tamil Nadu secured 69% of jobs (23,451) in ECMS third tranche with Rs 27,166 crore investments from Tata Electronics (1,500 jobs), Motherson (5,741 jobs), and Foxconn (16,210 jobs).
In 2025, Tamil Nadu signed over 270 MoUs worth Rs 2.07 lakh crore committed investments, creating over 4 lakh job opportunities.

Taiwan's Pei Hai Group to invest Rs 720 crore at SIPCOT Melur creating 15,000 jobs, majority for women.

Sakthi Aircraft to set up 2/4-seater trainer aircraft manufacturing hub in Tiruppur with Rs 500 crore investment creating 1,200 jobs.
Mindox Techno to invest Rs 398 crore for semiconductor equipment manufacturing facility in Coimbatore creating 460 jobs.
